description_long: This object is a single, medium-sized banana with a gently curved shape and a slightly thickened stem at one end. The peel is predominantly yellow with numerous brown spots and streaks, indicating natural aging and handling. There are visible blemishes and a darkened area near the bottom, as well as a small tear or split at the tip of the stem. The surface texture appears matte with a semi-soft, slightly waxy feel, and the banana's body is plump and intact. The banana is free of any commercial stickers or labels, and the peel shows some minor bruising but remains mostly unbroken. The overall appearance suggests a banana that has been handled but is still structurally sound.
description: A medium, curved yellow banana with brown spots, minor blemishes, and a slightly split stem. The peel is mostly intact with some bruising and no visible stickers.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full curve, brown spots, and a dark blemish near the bottom.
description_view_1: End-on view highlighting the thickened stem and a dark streak running along the length.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying more brown speckling and the gentle arc of the banana.
description_view_3: View from the other end, showing the split at the stem and the inner curve of the banana.
attribute_peel_condition: The banana's peel is mostly intact with visible brown spots, streaks, and a dark blemish near the bottom. There is a small tear or split at the stem, and minor bruising is present, but the surface remains largely unbroken.
